description: Known Java-vs-.NET runtime parity divergences. Entries are matched by operation and optional file, fileGlob, category, or categoryGlob.

entries.reason: Parser header recovery differs from Java for this malformed/header-offset fixture, so downstream operations are missing until load parity is fixed.
Rendering minimal parser fixtures currently throws before producing Java-compatible blank-page output.
Text extraction for minimal parser fixtures currently throws before producing Java-compatible text output.
Default PDFTextStripper semantic output still differs from Java for many successful text extraction cases.
Saved .NET output reloads in Java but exposes object-stream/page-tree traversal gaps; Java cannot visit the expected page index after save.
Saved .NET output reloads in Java but loses Java-observable text or first-page render semantics; tracked as remaining semantic parity work.
Current .NET first-page renders are blank or near-uniform while Java renders non-background content; tracked as regression fixtures for render validity.
Placeholder renders are reported separately until PageDrawer and related rendering gaps are fixed.
Successful render output may be blank or near-blank until rendering validity checks and PageDrawer work land.
Pattern color space rendering fails until advanced rendering work is implemented.
